title: Safe, controlled changes - no surprises
description: All work is done in a way that minimizes risk and keeps your application safe.

principles.title: Isolated branches
principles.description: Work is done in isolated branches - never directly on production

principles.title: Rollback safe
principles.description: Every change can be safely rolled back

principles.title: No risky rewrites
principles.description: No risky rewrites or unnecessary changes

note: If your project does not have proper setup (repository, staging), I can help establish a safe workflow first.
